highlights.title: Provider adapters and streaming
highlights.description: Add provider-agnostic GenerationService, HTTP provider adapters (including a Context7 shim), and SSE streaming preview for progressive generation.

highlights.title: LangChain adapter (opt-in)
highlights.description: Optional LangChain adapter implemented with lazy imports; LangChain tests are gated behind a manual CI workflow (USE_LANGCHAIN=1).

highlights.title: Integration tests & CI
highlights.description: Add an integration test for pipeline generation persistence and a manual GitHub Actions workflow to run the suite with LangChain enabled.
